title: Linux Systemd Service Persistence
description: Detects creation or enabling of systemd services, a common persistence mechanism where attackers install malicious services that survive reboots.
query: ('Log Source' = 'SOC Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Secure Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Syslog Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'Linux Audit Logs') and (((msg like '*systemctl enable*' or msg like '*systemctl daemon-reload*' or msg like '*/etc/systemd/system/*')) and (msg like '*.service*'))
